feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Wish Each Other On Raksha Bandhan Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Wish Each Other On Raksha Bandhan Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Wish Each Other On Raksha Bandhan
പരസ്പരം രക്ഷാബന്ധന്‍ ആശംസകള്‍ നേര്‍ന്ന് പ്രിയങ്കയും രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയും. സഹോദരനും കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് നേതാവുമായ രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയെ കുറിച്ചുള്ള വൈകാരികമായ കുറിപ്പും എഐസിസി ജനറല്‍ സെക്രട്ടറി പ്രിയങ്ക ഗാന്ധി പങ്ക് വച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. സ്നേഹവും, ക്ഷമയും സഹനവും താന്‍ പഠിച്ചത് തന്റെ സഹോദരനായ രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയില്‍ നിന്നാണെന്ന് ട്വിറ്ററില്‍ പങ്കുവച്ച കുറിപ്പില്‍ പറയുന്നു. അദ്ദേഹത്തെ പോലം സഹോദരനെ കിട്ടിയതില്‍ തനിക്ക് അഭിമാനമാണുള്ളതെന്ന് പ്രിയങ്ക കുറിപ്പില്‍ പറയുന്നു. രാഹുലിനോടൊപ്പമുള്ള ചിത്രങ്ങള്‍ പങ്കുവച്ചാണ് പ്രിയങ്ക ഇക്കാര്യം കുറിച്ചത്.
entry.summary: Rahul Gandhi, Priyanka Wish Each Other On Raksha Bandhan പരസ്പരം രക്ഷാബന്ധന്‍ ആശംസകള്‍ നേര്‍ന്ന് പ്രിയങ്കയും രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയും. സഹോദരനും കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് നേതാവുമായ രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയെ കുറിച്ചുള്ള വൈകാരികമായ കുറിപ്പും എഐസിസി ജനറല്‍ സെക്രട്ടറി പ്രിയങ്ക ഗാന്ധി പങ്ക് വച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. സ്നേഹവും, ക്ഷമയും സഹനവും താന്‍ പഠിച്ചത് തന്റെ സഹോദരനായ രാഹുല്‍ ഗാന്ധിയില്‍ നിന്നാണെന്ന് ട്വിറ്ററില്‍ പങ്കുവച്ച കുറിപ്പില്‍ പറയുന്നു. അദ്ദേഹത്തെ പോലം സഹോദരനെ കിട്ടിയതില്‍ തനിക്ക് അഭിമാനമാണുള്ളതെന്ന് പ്രിയങ്ക കുറിപ്പില്‍ പറയുന്നു. രാഹുലിനോടൊപ്പമുള്ള ചിത്രങ്ങള്‍ പങ്കുവച്ചാണ് പ്രിയങ്ക ഇക്കാര്യം കുറിച്ചത്.

entry.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 13) - Mother Nature’s Son - Part 2 - 1981

link.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 13) - Mother Nature’s Son - Part 2 - 1981

entry.content:
Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold.
Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich.
After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald).
The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.
entry.summary: Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold. Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich. After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald). The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.

entry.title: Joe Rogan _ House Tour _ $5 Million Bell Canyon Mansion

link.title: Joe Rogan _ House Tour _ $5 Million Bell Canyon Mansion

entry.content:
Joe Rogan is an American comedian, actor, martial arts expert, UFC commentator, podcaster and all around bad-ass who has recently increased his net-worth profile to a staggering $100 Million!
Joe first came to the public’s attention after appearing in “News Radio” before going onto host the hit reality series “Fear Factor” and combining his talent for entertainment with his passion for martial arts by joining forces with UFC to help popularize MMA. But it would be his late career renaissance where he re-invented himself as one of the most popular podcasters on the internet that would have him swimming in so much dough he could afford to buy a $5 Million home in Bell Canyon, California.
#JoeRogan #HouseTour #RealEstate #BellCanyon #LosAngeles #WoodlandHill #California #Texas #LuxuryEstate
entry.summary: Joe Rogan is an American comedian, actor, martial arts expert, UFC commentator, podcaster and all around bad-ass who has recently increased his net-worth profile to a staggering $100 Million! Joe first came to the public’s attention after appearing in “News Radio” before going onto host the hit reality series “Fear Factor” and combining his talent for entertainment with his passion for martial arts by joining forces with UFC to help popularize MMA. But it would be his late career renaissance where he re-invented himself as one of the most popular podcasters on the internet that would have him swimming in so much dough he could afford to buy a $5 Million home in Bell Canyon, California. #JoeRogan #HouseTour #RealEstate #BellCanyon #LosAngeles #WoodlandHill #California #Texas #LuxuryEstate

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s Case Transferred To CBI : Centre Accepts Bihar Govt’s Request Oneindia

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s Case Transferred To CBI : Centre Accepts Bihar Govt’s Request Oneindia

entry.content:
In a new turn in Sushant Singh Rajput’s case, Solicitor General Tushar Mehta stated before Supreme Court that Centre has accepted Bihar govt’s request of CBI enquiry. On August 04, Bihar CM Nitish Kumar had recommended CBI enquiry in Sushant Singh Rajput’s case.
#SushantSinghRajput
#RheaChakraborty
#SushantCBIenquiryCentreaccepts
#SushantCBIEnquiry
#BiharCMNitishKumar
#SushantSinghRajputCaseTransferredCBI
#BreakTheSilenceForSushant
#CBIEnquiryForSushant
#justiceforSushanthSinghRajput
#Dishasalian
#Bollywood
#Chhichhore
#Msdhoni
#Mumbai
#సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్‌పుత్
#రియా చక్రవర్తి
దేశవ్యాప్తంగా సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్ పుత్ కేసు సంచలనంగా మారుతోంది. గత కొన్ని వారాలుగా కేసుని సీబీఐకి అప్లగించాలని సాధారణ జనాల నుంచి ప్రముఖ సెలబ్రెటీస్ వరకు అందరూ సోషల్ మీడియా ద్వారా వారి భావాన్ని తెలియజేశారు. ఇక ఎట్టకేలకు సీబీఐ విచారణకు ఆమోదం లభించింది. సీబీఐ విచారణ కోసం బీహార్ ప్రభుత్వం కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వాన్ని కోరగా వెంటనే గ్రీన్ సిగ్నల్ లభించింది
entry.summary: In a new turn in Sushant Singh Rajput’s case, Solicitor General Tushar Mehta stated before Supreme Court that Centre has accepted Bihar govt’s request of CBI enquiry. On August 04, Bihar CM Nitish Kumar had recommended CBI enquiry in Sushant Singh Rajput’s case. #SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakraborty #SushantCBIenquiryCentreaccepts #SushantCBIEnquiry #BiharCMNitishKumar #SushantSinghRajputCaseTransferredCBI #BreakTheSilenceForSushant #CBIEnquiryForSushant #justiceforSushanthSinghRajput #Dishasalian #Bollywood #Chhichhore #Msdhoni #Mumbai #సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్‌పుత్ #రియా చక్రవర్తి దేశవ్యాప్తంగా సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్ పుత్ కేసు సంచలనంగా మారుతోంది. గత కొన్ని వారాలుగా కేసుని సీబీఐకి అప్లగించాలని సాధారణ జనాల నుంచి ప్రముఖ సెలబ్రెటీస్ వరకు అందరూ సోషల్ మీడియా ద్వారా వారి భావాన్ని తెలియజేశారు. ఇక ఎట్టకేలకు సీబీఐ విచారణకు ఆమోదం లభించింది. సీబీఐ విచారణ కోసం బీహార్ ప్రభుత్వం కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వాన్ని కోరగా వెంటనే గ్రీన్ సిగ్నల్ లభించింది

entry.title: Oprah Winfrey Takes Over Louisville Billboards to Seek Justice for Breonna Taylor

link.title: Oprah Winfrey Takes Over Louisville Billboards to Seek Justice for Breonna Taylor

entry.content:
Oprah Winfrey Takes Over Louisville Billboards to Seek Justice for Breonna Taylor..
The former daytime talk show host pays tribute to the victim of botched police raid while demanding the arrest of police officers involved in her death. Aug 8, 2020  AceShowbiz - Oprah Winfrey has taken over billboards around Louisville, Kentucky to demand police officers involved in the killing of Breonna Taylor are brought to justice.   Taylor, a 26-year-old emergency room technician, died at the hands of police in the city in March (20), as they shot her after entering her home with a "no knock warrant" during a botched drugs sting relating to a suspect already in custody.       According to Variety, the billboards demand that the officer involved in the killing of Taylor be arrested and charged and share the web address of the website for Until Freedom, an organisation battling racial injustice who have taken up the Taylor case.   Winfrey also recently stepped back from the cover of her signature publication, O, The Oprah Magazine, by splashing a picture of Taylor in her us …
entry.summary: Oprah Winfrey Takes Over Louisville Billboards to Seek Justice for Breonna Taylor.. The former daytime talk show host pays tribute to the victim of botched police raid while demanding the arrest of police officers involved in her death. Aug 8, 2020 AceShowbiz - Oprah Winfrey has taken over billboards around Louisville, Kentucky to demand police officers involved in the killing of Breonna Taylor are brought to justice. Taylor, a 26-year-old emergency room technician, died at the hands of police in the city in March (20), as they shot her after entering her home with a "no knock warrant" during a botched drugs sting relating to a suspect already in custody. According to Variety, the billboards demand that the officer involved in the killing of Taylor be arrested and charged and share the web address of the website for Until Freedom, an organisation battling racial injustice who have taken up the Taylor case. Winfrey also recently stepped back from the cover of her signature publication, O, The Oprah Magazine, by splashing a picture of Taylor in her us …

entry.title: Video of the Day: Istri Ferry Irawan Sakit Stroke, Postingan Galau Nadya Mustika Rahayu Bikin Heboh

link.title: Video of the Day: Istri Ferry Irawan Sakit Stroke, Postingan Galau Nadya Mustika Rahayu Bikin Heboh

entry.content:
Dari istri aktor senior Ferry Irawan, Anggi Novita, sedang sakit stroke dan dirawat di rumah sakit sampai unggahan teranyar istri Rizki D’Academy 2, Nadya Mustika Rahayu ramai menjadi buah bibir, yuk saksikan video Hot MataMata.com hari ini, Sabtu (8/8/2020).
1. Lama Tak Berkabar, Istri Ferry Irawan Sedang Dirawat karena Stroke
Kabar kurang menyenangkan datang dari aktor senior Ferry Irawan. Lama tak terdengar kabarnya, Istri Ferry Irawan, Anggi Novita, sedang sakit stroke dan dirawat di rumah sakit.
Baca Selengkapnya
2. Pernikahan Baru Seumur Jagung, Postingan Galau Istri Rizki DA2 Bikin Heboh
Unggahan teranyar istri Rizki D’Academy 2 menjadi buah bibir khalayak ramai. Pasalnya, Nadya Mustika Rahayu mendadak mem-posting kata-kata galau di Instagram Storiesnya pada Sabtu (8/8).
Baca Selengkapnya
3. Salah Orang, Ashanty Lacak Terus Penghina Aurel Hermansyah
Ashanty mengaku sudah telponan dengan pemilik account keluarga Aisyah. Bahwa pelakunya @aisyah_maharani_123 yang menghina Aurel Hermansyah itu benar, tapi dia memakai foto anak kecil yang salah.
Baca Selengkapnya
4. Tretan Muslim dan Coki Diduga Sindir 4 YouTuber Sampai Trending
Channel SkinnyIndonesia24 masuk 10 besar Trending YouTube di konten YouTube’s Got Talent part 3. Di episode tersebut sala satunya menghadirkan komika Tretan Muslim dan Coki Pardede yang menyindir habis-habisan empat YouTuber di Indonesia.
Baca Selengkapnya
5. Puncaki Trending, BLACKPINK Rayakan Anniversary ke-4 Hari Ini
Pada hari ini, Sabtu (8/8/2020), BLACKPINK rayakan anniversary ke-4 di panggung musik. Para membernya, yakni Jennie, Rose, Lisa dan Jisoo mengunggah foto perayaan di Instagram untuk menyambut momen istimewa ini.
Baca Selengkapnya
entry.summary: Dari istri aktor senior Ferry Irawan, Anggi Novita, sedang sakit stroke dan dirawat di rumah sakit sampai unggahan teranyar istri Rizki D’Academy 2, Nadya Mustika Rahayu ramai menjadi buah bibir, yuk saksikan video Hot MataMata.com hari ini, Sabtu (8/8/2020). 1. Lama Tak Berkabar, Istri Ferry Irawan Sedang Dirawat karena Stroke Kabar kurang menyenangkan datang dari aktor senior Ferry Irawan. Lama tak terdengar kabarnya, Istri Ferry Irawan, Anggi Novita, sedang sakit stroke dan dirawat di rumah sakit. Baca Selengkapnya 2. Pernikahan Baru Seumur Jagung, Postingan Galau Istri Rizki DA2 Bikin Heboh Unggahan teranyar istri Rizki D’Academy 2 menjadi buah bibir khalayak ramai. Pasalnya, Nadya Mustika Rahayu mendadak mem-posting kata-kata galau di Instagram Storiesnya pada Sabtu (8/8). Baca Selengkapnya 3. Salah Orang, Ashanty Lacak Terus Penghina Aurel Hermansyah Ashanty mengaku sudah telponan dengan pemilik account keluarga Aisyah. Bahwa pelakunya @aisyah_maharani_123 yang menghina Aurel Hermansyah itu benar, tapi dia memakai foto anak kecil yang salah. Baca Selengkapnya 4. Tretan Muslim dan Coki Diduga Sindir 4 YouTuber Sampai Trending Channel SkinnyIndonesia24 masuk 10 besar Trending YouTube di konten YouTube’s Got Talent part 3. Di episode tersebut sala satunya menghadirkan komika Tretan Muslim dan Coki Pardede yang menyindir habis-habisan empat YouTuber di Indonesia. Baca Selengkapnya 5. Puncaki Trending, BLACKPINK Rayakan Anniversary ke-4 Hari Ini Pada hari ini, Sabtu (8/8/2020), BLACKPINK rayakan anniversary ke-4 di panggung musik. Para membernya, yakni Jennie, Rose, Lisa dan Jisoo mengunggah foto perayaan di Instagram untuk menyambut momen istimewa ini. Baca Selengkapnya

entry.title: Dr CYRILLE TOLLO : A Camair-Co, sans éthique, il n’y a point de performance

link.title: Dr CYRILLE TOLLO : A Camair-Co, sans éthique, il n’y a point de performance

entry.content: Universitaire, Cyrille Tollo est également expert en management et stratégie. C’est à ce dernier titre qu’il a été conseiller du directeur général de la Camair-Co, en 2013. Malgré son obligation de réserve, il a accepté de partager avec JDC TV ses réflexions pour une restructuration de la compagnie aérienne du Cameroun. Selon lui, un audit préalable doit être fait, puisqu’il a manqué à l’État du courage et un leadership au lancement cette entreprise publique.
entry.summary: Universitaire, Cyrille Tollo est également expert en management et stratégie. C’est à ce dernier titre qu’il a été conseiller du directeur général de la Camair-Co, en 2013. Malgré son obligation de réserve, il a accepté de partager avec JDC TV ses réflexions pour une restructuration de la compagnie aérienne du Cameroun. Selon lui, un audit préalable doit être fait, puisqu’il a manqué à l’État du courage et un leadership au lancement cette entreprise publique.

entry.title: Déconfinement : les Free Parties inquiètent les autorités

link.title: Déconfinement : les Free Parties inquiètent les autorités

entry.content:
Appelées Free Parties, plusieurs soirées clandestines sont organisées en extérieur. En pleine période de crise sanitaire, les autorités tentent malgré tout d’y faire respecter au maximum les gestes barrières.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Appelées Free Parties, plusieurs soirées clandestines sont organisées en extérieur. En pleine période de crise sanitaire, les autorités tentent malgré tout d’y faire respecter au maximum les gestes barrières. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Imam Kanté sur les propos de Jamra, un talibé meurt n0yé, un marabout arrêté avec des faux billets..

entry.title: La aplicación ‘Radar COVID’ obtiene resultados ‘tremendamente positivos’

link.title: La aplicación ‘Radar COVID’ obtiene resultados ‘tremendamente positivos’

entry.content: La secretaria de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial, Carme Artigas, ha detallado este lunes que la aplicación voluntaria de alerta de contagios ‘Radar COVID’ ha obtenido unos resultados "tremendamente positivos" en su versión piloto en la isla de La Gomera, y ha destacado su eficacia.
entry.summary: La secretaria de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial, Carme Artigas, ha detallado este lunes que la aplicación voluntaria de alerta de contagios ‘Radar COVID’ ha obtenido unos resultados "tremendamente positivos" en su versión piloto en la isla de La Gomera, y ha destacado su eficacia.

entry.title: Dulquer Salmaan Faced Privacy Probelms In His Childhood Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Dulquer Salmaan Faced Privacy Probelms In His Childhood Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
Dulquer Salmaan Faced Privacy Probelms In His Childhood Because Of His Father Mammootty’s Celebrity Image
അടുത്തിടെയായിരുന്നു ദുല്‍ഖര്‍ സല്‍മാന്‍ പിറന്നാളാഘോഷിച്ചത്. താരങ്ങളും ആരാധകരുമൊക്കെയായി നിരവധി പേരായിരുന്നു അദ്ദേഹത്തിന് ആശംസകള്‍ അറിയിച്ചത്. പിറന്നാളിനോടനുബന്ധിച്ച് അദ്ദേഹം കുട്ടികളുമായി സൗഹൃദ സംഭാഷണം നടത്തിയിരുന്നു. വീഡിയോ കോളിലൂടെയായിരുന്നു കുട്ടികള്‍ താരവുമായി സംവദിച്ചത്
entry.summary: Dulquer Salmaan Faced Privacy Probelms In His Childhood Because Of His Father Mammootty’s Celebrity Image അടുത്തിടെയായിരുന്നു ദുല്‍ഖര്‍ സല്‍മാന്‍ പിറന്നാളാഘോഷിച്ചത്. താരങ്ങളും ആരാധകരുമൊക്കെയായി നിരവധി പേരായിരുന്നു അദ്ദേഹത്തിന് ആശംസകള്‍ അറിയിച്ചത്. പിറന്നാളിനോടനുബന്ധിച്ച് അദ്ദേഹം കുട്ടികളുമായി സൗഹൃദ സംഭാഷണം നടത്തിയിരുന്നു. വീഡിയോ കോളിലൂടെയായിരുന്നു കുട്ടികള്‍ താരവുമായി സംവദിച്ചത്

entry.title: UK man launches giant Rubik’s Cube into wheelie bin

link.title: UK man launches giant Rubik’s Cube into wheelie bin

entry.content:
This is the bizarre moment a man from Ipswich in the UK launched a giant Rubik’s cube across his garden into an open wheelie bin.
The footage shows Tony Fisher, a huge fan of the colourful puzzles, carefully placing a giant Rubik’s Cube on one end of a homemade see-saw.
Fisher then jumps on the other end sending the cube sailing through the air and straight into the open bin.
Fisher then shows just how many attempts it took to get right.
entry.summary: This is the bizarre moment a man from Ipswich in the UK launched a giant Rubik’s cube across his garden into an open wheelie bin. The footage shows Tony Fisher, a huge fan of the colourful puzzles, carefully placing a giant Rubik’s Cube on one end of a homemade see-saw. Fisher then jumps on the other end sending the cube sailing through the air and straight into the open bin. Fisher then shows just how many attempts it took to get right.

entry.title: Tous en cuisine : Cyril Lignac bientôt de retour

link.title: Tous en cuisine : Cyril Lignac bientôt de retour

entry.content:
Cyril Lignac : de retour avec
Tous en Cuisine.
C’était le carton du confinement.
L’émission Tous en cuisine a permis à M6 de réaliser des records d’audience sur la case très concurrentielle de l’access prime time.
Le programme avait alors été prolongé au-delà du déconfinement avant de s’arrêter à l’approche de la période estivale. .
L’émission avait rassemblé jusqu’à 2,6 millions de téléspectateurs en moyenne selon Médiamétrie.
Le programme est renouvelé pour une 2ème saison, diffusée du lundi au vendredi à 18h45 dès le 24 août 2020.
La production de l’émission a décidé de faire évoluer le programme en y incorporant quelques nouveautés.
Par exemple, Cyril Lignac recevra chaque semaine un expert dans un domaine particulier. .
Il s’agit de faire découvrir des spécialités locales ou bien encore des plats aux saveurs d’ailleurs. .
De plus, Jérôme Anthony partira aussi à la rencontre des producteurs locaux à travers l’hexagone.
L’objectif de cette nouveauté pour l’émission est de réaliser un focus sur un produit en particulier, et de le cuisiner avec celui qui le cultive
entry.summary: Cyril Lignac : de retour avec Tous en Cuisine. C’était le carton du confinement. L’émission Tous en cuisine a permis à M6 de réaliser des records d’audience sur la case très concurrentielle de l’access prime time. Le programme avait alors été prolongé au-delà du déconfinement avant de s’arrêter à l’approche de la période estivale. . L’émission avait rassemblé jusqu’à 2,6 millions de téléspectateurs en moyenne selon Médiamétrie. Le programme est renouvelé pour une 2ème saison, diffusée du lundi au vendredi à 18h45 dès le 24 août 2020. La production de l’émission a décidé de faire évoluer le programme en y incorporant quelques nouveautés. Par exemple, Cyril Lignac recevra chaque semaine un expert dans un domaine particulier. . Il s’agit de faire découvrir des spécialités locales ou bien encore des plats aux saveurs d’ailleurs. . De plus, Jérôme Anthony partira aussi à la rencontre des producteurs locaux à travers l’hexagone. L’objectif de cette nouveauté pour l’émission est de réaliser un focus sur un produit en particulier, et de le cuisiner avec celui qui le cultive

entry.title: Andhra Pradesh : Covid Care Centre में आग, 7 लोगों की मौत,कई घायल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Andhra Pradesh : Covid Care Centre में आग, 7 लोगों की मौत,कई घायल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
A fierce fire broke out in a hotel in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh. As soon as the incident was known, the team of the fire brigade reached the spot and the fire has been controlled after a lot of hard work … Seven people died in the accident. And 30 people have been injured…. Who have been admitted to the hospital…. This hotel was being used as a Covid Center. Corona patients were being treated here … Relief and rescue work is going on currently … The accident took place at the Hotel Golden Palace in Vijayawada.
आंध्र प्रदेश के विजयवाड़ा स्थित एक होटल में भीषण आग लग गई.घटना की जानकारी मिलते ही फायर ब्रिगड की टीम मौके पर पहुंच गई और कड़ी मशक्कत के बाद आग पर काबू पा लिया गया है…हादसे में 7 सात लोगों की मौत हो गई है.और 30 लोग घायल हो गए हैं….जिन्हें अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है…..आपको बता दें कि. इस होटल का इस्तेमाल कोविड सेंटर के रूप में किया जा रहा था.यहां कोरोना मरीजों का इलाज किया जा रहा था…फिलहाल राहत और बचाव कार्य जारी है.. . ये हादसा विजयवाडा के होटल स्वर्ण पैलेस में हुआ है.
#AndhraPradesh #Vijayawada
entry.summary: A fierce fire broke out in a hotel in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh. As soon as the incident was known, the team of the fire brigade reached the spot and the fire has been controlled after a lot of hard work … Seven people died in the accident. And 30 people have been injured…. Who have been admitted to the hospital…. This hotel was being used as a Covid Center. Corona patients were being treated here … Relief and rescue work is going on currently … The accident took place at the Hotel Golden Palace in Vijayawada. आंध्र प्रदेश के विजयवाड़ा स्थित एक होटल में भीषण आग लग गई.घटना की जानकारी मिलते ही फायर ब्रिगड की टीम मौके पर पहुंच गई और कड़ी मशक्कत के बाद आग पर काबू पा लिया गया है…हादसे में 7 सात लोगों की मौत हो गई है.और 30 लोग घायल हो गए हैं….जिन्हें अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है…..आपको बता दें कि. इस होटल का इस्तेमाल कोविड सेंटर के रूप में किया जा रहा था.यहां कोरोना मरीजों का इलाज किया जा रहा था…फिलहाल राहत और बचाव कार्य जारी है.. . ये हादसा विजयवाडा के होटल स्वर्ण पैलेस में हुआ है. #AndhraPradesh #Vijayawada

link.title: FALSE: Robredo says motorcycle passengers should face backward

entry.content:
A quote card claims Vice President Leni Robredo said motorcycle passengers should face backward while riding so barriers would no longer be needed. The claim is FALSE.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput కు మరణానికి ముందు ఫోన్ చేసిన Disha, జూన్ 13 న ఆ పార్టీలో ఏదో జరిగింది?

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput కు మరణానికి ముందు ఫోన్ చేసిన Disha, జూన్ 13 న ఆ పార్టీలో ఏదో జరిగింది?

entry.content:
ముంబై పోలీసుల దర్యాప్తు అనేక అనుమానాలు తలెత్తుతున్న నేపథ్యంలో మహారాష్ట్ర సీనియర్ బీజేపీ నేత, మాజీ ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారాయణ రాణే సంచలన ఆరోపణలు చేశారు. ఇటీవల మాజీ ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారాయణ రాణే ఓ ప్రెస్‌మీట్‌లో మాట్లాడుతూ.. దిశ సలియాన్‌ను కొందరు రేప్ చేశారు.
#SushantSinghRajput
#RheaChakraborty
#DishaSalian
#BJPleaderNarayanaRane
#DinoMorea
#SushantSinghRajputbankstatements
#SushantCBIEnquiry
#mumbaipolice
#MLANithishRane
#BreakTheSilenceForSushant
#CBIEnquiryForSushant
#justiceforSushanthSinghRajput
#Dishasalian
#Bollywood
#Chhichhore
#Msdhoni
#Mumbai
#సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్‌పుత్
#రియా చక్రవర్తి
entry.summary: ముంబై పోలీసుల దర్యాప్తు అనేక అనుమానాలు తలెత్తుతున్న నేపథ్యంలో మహారాష్ట్ర సీనియర్ బీజేపీ నేత, మాజీ ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారాయణ రాణే సంచలన ఆరోపణలు చేశారు. ఇటీవల మాజీ ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారాయణ రాణే ఓ ప్రెస్‌మీట్‌లో మాట్లాడుతూ.. దిశ సలియాన్‌ను కొందరు రేప్ చేశారు. #SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakraborty #DishaSalian #BJPleaderNarayanaRane #DinoMorea #SushantSinghRajputbankstatements #SushantCBIEnquiry #mumbaipolice #MLANithishRane #BreakTheSilenceForSushant #CBIEnquiryForSushant #justiceforSushanthSinghRajput #Dishasalian #Bollywood #Chhichhore #Msdhoni #Mumbai #సుశాంత్ సింగ్ రాజ్‌పుత్ #రియా చక్రవర్తి

entry.title: Calvados : un nageur sauvé « par hasard » par des sauveteurs en mer

link.title: Calvados : un nageur sauvé « par hasard » par des sauveteurs en mer

entry.content: Sans un coup de pouce du destin (et de la SNSM), la virée aquatique d’un nageur aurait pu virer au drame. Mercredi 5 août, cet homme a été sauvé « par hasard » au large de Courseulles-sur-Mer (Calvados) par une équipe de la Société nationale de sauvetage en mer, rapporte 20 Minutes d’après une information de Liberté Caen.
entry.summary: Sans un coup de pouce du destin (et de la SNSM), la virée aquatique d’un nageur aurait pu virer au drame. Mercredi 5 août, cet homme a été sauvé « par hasard » au large de Courseulles-sur-Mer (Calvados) par une équipe de la Société nationale de sauvetage en mer, rapporte 20 Minutes d’après une information de Liberté Caen.

entry.title: Willian to REJECT Chelsea Deal And Sign For Arsenal! Transfer Talk

link.title: Willian to REJECT Chelsea Deal And Sign For Arsenal! Transfer Talk

entry.content:
This week we start with the two exciting young defenders who could be heading to the Premier League this summer, in Sergio Reguilon and Gabriel. Reguilon has won a number of admirers with his strong displays on loan at Sevilla, and now could be set to depart Real Madrid for either Everton or Chelsea, while Gabriel has piqued the interest of Manchester United.
Our headline story looks at the current transfer saga of Chelsea star Willian, and why Arsenal are front runners to be his new home.
We look at Leicester City’s audacious attempt to bring in Barcelona winger Francisco Trincão, who is yet to even play for the Blaugrana, and also AC Milan’s pursuit of Tottenham right-back Serge Aurier.
Finally we profile QPR’s Eberechi Eze, the man Crystal Palace want to rejuvenate their attack.
Remember to like and subscribe, and leave your comments below. But most of all, enjoy!
entry.summary: This week we start with the two exciting young defenders who could be heading to the Premier League this summer, in Sergio Reguilon and Gabriel. Reguilon has won a number of admirers with his strong displays on loan at Sevilla, and now could be set to depart Real Madrid for either Everton or Chelsea, while Gabriel has piqued the interest of Manchester United. Our headline story looks at the current transfer saga of Chelsea star Willian, and why Arsenal are front runners to be his new home. We look at Leicester City’s audacious attempt to bring in Barcelona winger Francisco Trincão, who is yet to even play for the Blaugrana, and also AC Milan’s pursuit of Tottenham right-back Serge Aurier. Finally we profile QPR’s Eberechi Eze, the man Crystal Palace want to rejuvenate their attack. Remember to like and subscribe, and leave your comments below. But most of all, enjoy!

entry.title: V Hanumantha Rao Slams TRS Govt డాక్యుమెంట్లు సరిగ్గా ఉన్నా ప్రభుత్వ భూములు అంటూ ఆక్రమణ !

link.title: V Hanumantha Rao Slams TRS Govt డాక్యుమెంట్లు సరిగ్గా ఉన్నా ప్రభుత్వ భూములు అంటూ ఆక్రమణ !

entry.content:
Congress Senior Leader V Hanumantha Rao Slams TRS Govt, KCR And Harish Rao over land grabbing of Poor People
#VHanumanthaRao
#TRSGovt
#KCR
#HarishRao
#CongressSeniorLeader
#telangana
#landgrabbing
#landdocuments
#విహనుమంతరావు
భూమి పట్టాలు పేదల పేరు మీదే ఉన్నా కాంగ్రెస్ హయాంలోనే అవి ప్రభుత్వ భూములు అయ్యాయి అంటూ పేదల స్థలాలను, భూములను తెరాస ప్రభుత్వం లాక్కుంటుంది అని కాంగ్రెస్ నేత వి హనుమంతరావు కెసిఆర్ పైన అలాగే హరీష్ రావు పైన మండిపడ్డారు
entry.summary: Congress Senior Leader V Hanumantha Rao Slams TRS Govt, KCR And Harish Rao over land grabbing of Poor People #VHanumanthaRao #TRSGovt #KCR #HarishRao #CongressSeniorLeader #telangana #landgrabbing #landdocuments #విహనుమంతరావు భూమి పట్టాలు పేదల పేరు మీదే ఉన్నా కాంగ్రెస్ హయాంలోనే అవి ప్రభుత్వ భూములు అయ్యాయి అంటూ పేదల స్థలాలను, భూములను తెరాస ప్రభుత్వం లాక్కుంటుంది అని కాంగ్రెస్ నేత వి హనుమంతరావు కెసిఆర్ పైన అలాగే హరీష్ రావు పైన మండిపడ్డారు
